creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gabriel M. Dutra from comment #11)

With these changes, the shell completion files are now never installed.  Is this intended?  To fix this issue, join all the post-install-XXX-on targets into one post-install target.  Also join all XXX_PLIST_FILES macros into PLIST_FILES.

Rest of the port looks ok.
